name: nul_in_value
reason: U+0000 not representable losslessly in all lineages

name: nul_in_key
reason: U+0000 not representable losslessly in all lineages

name: dup_key_toplevel
reason: RFC 8259 duplicate-name behavior undefined; three-way divergence observed

name: dup_key_nested
reason: duplicate detection required at any depth

name: dup_key_escaped
reason: duplicates compare on the DECODED name

name: dup_key_in_array
reason: duplicate detection inside objects nested in arrays

name: exponent_overflow
reason: overflows double; three accept/four reject divergence observed

name: decimal_below_1e_minus_6
reason: RFC 8785 emits exponent form below 1e-6; outside plain-decimal domain

name: lone_high_surrogate
reason: unpaired surrogate is not a Unicode scalar value

name: leading_bom
reason: BOM is not JSON; two lineages silently skipped it

name: trailing_garbage
reason: input must be exactly one JSON document

name: two_documents
reason: input must be exactly one JSON document

name: empty_input
reason: input must be exactly one JSON document
